Key Features

Our Advantages

UniJoin offers a range of advantages when you use our service

CoinJoin Technology
Using CoinJoin technology to provide the highest quality and most optimized method of mixing.
Simple to Use
UniJoin specializes on simplicity. In just a few steps you can achieve anonymity with cryptos.
No Stored Logs
Your privacy is priority. That’s why it’s important for us to not jeopardize it by storing logs.
Tor Browser Integration
You can visit our website by using the Tor browser to achieve the highest level of anonymity.
About Us

What is UniJoin?

We offer services that help to stay anonymous with crypto finances

Mix With UniJoin

Regain Your Privacy

Unijoin allows you to regain your privacy when it comes to staying anonymous with your crypto finances. Because the majority of current cryptocurrencies, such as Bitcoin, Litecoin and more, are not truly anonymous, but rather pseudonymous.

Privatize Your Activities

As long as someone can link you to your wallet address, all of your financial activity is readable in the blockchain. It is then easier to analyze your activities than with a traditional bank.

Mix Your Cryptos

With Unijoin, you can regain and maintain your anonymity by mixing your cryptos in a pool with other anonymity enthusiasts and receive untraceable coins with help of coin-join technology. We join a pool unitedly and anonymize our crypto finances unitedly.

5 Simple Steps to Use Us

How It Works

Here we here we explain the easy work of our service

1
Create New Wallet
Create a new crypto wallet where you will store your untraceable coins
2
Input New Wallet Address
Select your desired coin to mix and input your new wallet address where you will receive your untraceable coins
3
Choose Distribution & Time Delay
Select a distribution & delay. The more random they are the better the anonymization of your coins
4
Join UniPool With Traceable Coins
Send your traceable coins for mixing to the specified address. After two blockchain confirmations, the mixing process begins.
5
Receive Untraceable Coins
Depending on your set time delay, the coins will be then sent to your new anonymous wallet address
Regain Your Privacy

Stay Anonymous

Buy, sell and send crypto more privately

Store Crypto
Funds
Store your crypto funds anonymously in your wallet by mixing them
Purchase Goods and Services Online
Make online purchases privately by sending funds with UniJoin
Send Crypto to Acquaintances
Send cryptos and break the connection back to your private wallet
Invest in Crypto in Restricted Countries
Invest in crypto in a number of countries where it’s restricted
Data Breach Scenarios
Anonymity Is Our Priority

Why People Choose Us

We offer a range of advantages when you use our service

Prevent Chainanalysis
Break all links to your crypto finances and your activities and gain complete anonymity.
No Account System
So that no links can be created, you anonymize your coins without creating an account.
Dedicated Development Team
Anonymity is as important to us as it is to you! We promise you total commitment from the team.
No Logs Policy
Your anonymity is our priority. We delete logs 24 hours after completion of the mixing process.

Best High-Privacy VPS Services To Pay With Bitcoin Or Other Crypto
Bitcoin as a payment mode has gained traction as it is used to pay for various goods and services. One such service is VPS. Interestingly, bitcoin and VPS aim to protect their users from privacy breaches. Find out which VPS services are good at providing privacy.

Event Announcement

Event Ends In:

UniJoin has launched their first giveaway! We are giving away a total of $2000 to 50 different participants.

What you must do:

There are several tasks you can do to win, such as following us on Twitter and other social media channels.

How you can win:

Different tasks will give you a number of entries. The more tasks you do, the more likely you are to win. Winners will still be randomly selected.

What you can win:

You can win $40. This will be sent via Bitcoin to your desired wallet address. The rewards will be distributed on July 19, 2022.
